title: Shiny Structure Void
description:
The mods I play with!
Fully client side!!
body:
![Shiny Structure Void](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a28a59634d9e00786bd5496530e2e0d39fe2bac1.png)

v1.1.9

## The mods I play with!
Mostly on [Flatnet](https://www.flatnet.gg/) And [Hypixel](https://hypixel.net/)

## Fully Client side!! (I think)
Use my [Shaders! (BSL only I think)](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1yrTlo0IEPqfQv3ZbUSUqyfcZp_7K9fMB/view)

# 

A simple modpack that adds *~~literally nothing~~* some stuff, 
mostly mods that make the game more enjoyable!

> Also includes the *Bare Bones* Resource pack (Optional)

Updated as I add Mods

# 

You can play on servers! (I would ask about *Bedrock Miner* first tho)

## Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/gcHgEC9wxe)

idk I'm bad at making descriptions

# Includes...
